name: Managing Product Collections
body:
[{"children":[{"text":"What are Collections?","bold":true}],"type":"p"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Collections are flexible product groupings that let you curate and display products based on rules or manual selection. Unlike categories, which follow a single hierarchy to structure products, collections can be arranged in hierarchies with far greater flexibility. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"They can be based on "},{"text":"multiple dimensions","bold":true},{"text":" such as category values, brand, tags, price ranges, or a combination of these. It makes collections especially useful for campaigns, promotions, or personalized shopping experiences where you need to dynamically group products."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Examples:","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"“New Arrivals”","italic":true},{"text":" – automatically adds products tagged with "},{"text":"new","italic":true},{"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"“Holiday Sale”","italic":true},{"text":" – includes products marked down during a sale period."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"“Summer Essentials”","italic":true},{"text":" – manually curated by the merchant."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Types of Collections"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Manual Collections","bold":true},{"text":" – Merchants hand-pick which products belong."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Automated Collections","bold":true},{"text":" – Products are automatically included when they match predefined conditions (e.g., "},{"text":"tag = “Sale”","italic":true},{"text":" or "},{"text":"Brand = Nike","italic":true},{"text":")."}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/LDAD5UY9ZJKY/4225b86a-593a-4174-9d9c-574207573786.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/LDAD5UY9ZJKY/4225b86a-593a-4174-9d9c-574207573786.png","name":"4225b86a-593a-4174-9d9c-574207573786.png","type":"image/png","size":3966977,"width":2560,"height":1447,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2FLDAD5UY9ZJKY%2F4225b86a-593a-4174-9d9c-574207573786.png","active":true,"mediaID":1199,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T11:49:30+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"How to Create an Automated Collection"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Automated Collections let merchants group products dynamically based on rules and conditions. Instead of manually adding items, you set criteria, and products that match are automatically included. This ensures your collections stay up to date without ongoing manual work."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Step 1:","bold":true},{"text":" Navigate to "},{"text":"Back Office → Products → Collections","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Step 2:","bold":true},{"text":" Click "},{"text":"New Collection","bold":true},{"text":" and select "},{"text":"Automated Collection","bold":true}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/2G6G5VA5H8QT/b7a52a56-f8fb-4b4b-929d-fc400ca06e2e.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/2G6G5VA5H8QT/b7a52a56-f8fb-4b4b-929d-fc400ca06e2e.png","name":"b7a52a56-f8fb-4b4b-929d-fc400ca06e2e.png","type":"image/png","size":3944305,"width":2560,"height":1447,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F2G6G5VA5H8QT%2Fb7a52a56-f8fb-4b4b-929d-fc400ca06e2e.png","active":true,"mediaID":1200,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T11:50:33+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"

"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The core of Automated Collections is rule-setting. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can add one or multiple rule for a collection. You can also choose if the collection should be created to match all the conditions or any one of the condition. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To add only one condition – enter details for the default condition section."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can enter:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fields","bold":true},{"text":": Product attribute to filter by"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Choose from options: Category, Tag, Brand, Product Types, Price & Title"}]}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Operator","bold":true},{"text":": Comparison logic"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Choose from options: Is Equal to, Is not Equal to, Greater Than, Less Than, Between, Not Between"}]}]}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Included Values","bold":true},{"text":": These depend on the Field you choose. For example:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"For "},{"text":"Category","italic":true},{"text":", values might be: Men, Clothing, Shoes"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"For "},{"text":"Price","italic":true},{"text":", you can enter a numeric value (e.g., "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Step 1: ","bold":true},{"text":"To Edit/delete existing collection, navigate to "},{"text":"Back Office → Products → Collections","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Step 2: ","bold":true},{"text":" Identify the collection you want to edit/delete and click on three dots under "},{"text":"Actions","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Step 3: ","bold":true},{"text":"Choose Action as per the requirement"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Select “"},{"text":"Edit","bold":true},{"text":"” to make changes to the existing collection."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Select “"},{"text":"Delete","bold":true},{"text":"” to remove the collection from the system. "}]}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/51AI8Q52FJ6X/image.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/51AI8Q52FJ6X/image.png","name":"image.png","type":"image/png","size":2451382,"width":2560,"height":1436,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F51AI8Q52FJ6X%2Fimage.png","active":true,"mediaID":1207,"dateInserted":"2025-10-27T11:54:33+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"
"},{"text":"Step 4: ","bold":true},{"text":"Once you click on "},{"text":"Edit,","bold":true},{"text":" you will be able to make changes to all segments of the collection. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Step 5: ","bold":true},{"text":" After making the changes, click on "},{"text":"Save","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Nested Dynamic Categories"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If your store uses "},{"text":"nested category structures","bold":true},{"text":", MCC supports "},{"text":"inherited logic","bold":true},{"text":" between parent and child collections."}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"When you create a "},{"text":"dynamic (rule-based) collection","bold":true},{"text":" for a parent category, all child categories "},{"text":"automatically inherit","bold":true},{"text":" the parent’s rules."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"You can still apply additional rules at the child level if needed."}]}]}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"Example: If your parent collection is "},{"text":"Men","bold":true},{"text":", and you create a child collection like "},{"text":"Men’s Essential Under $500","bold":true},{"text":", the child will automatically inherit the rules from the parent. "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This setup helps you build layered merchandising logic without repeating rule configurations across collections."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If a collection is marked as a child, inherited rules are applied automatically. You can still add new conditions specific to the child Collections from Category Imports"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When you "},{"text":"import products with new category values","bold":true},{"text":", MCC automatically creates a "},{"text":"collection matching the category name","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This helps clients coming from category-driven platforms (like Neto) by maintaining a familiar structure."}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Add a new category via product import or manually in the dashboard"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"MCC detects the new category and "},{"text":"creates a collection","bold":true},{"text":" with the same name"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"You can then apply merchandising rules, pinning, and sorting under this collection. "}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Auto-Creation of Collections via Product Import"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Additionally, you can automatically create both "},{"text":"categories and their matching collections","bold":true},{"text":" while importing products that reference "},{"text":"new category values","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This is especially useful during catalog setup or migration from platforms like "},{"text":"Neto","bold":true},{"text":", where categories are used to group products."}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"How It Works"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When you upload a product feed that includes a "},{"text":"new category","bold":true},{"text":" (i.e., a category value that doesn’t already exist in your system):"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"MCC "},{"text":"automatically creates the new category","bold":true},{"text":" under "},{"text":"Settings > Product Categories","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Simultaneously, it "},{"text":"creates a collection","bold":true},{"text":" using the same name under "},{"text":"Products > Collections","bold":true}]}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Example Scenario"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Let’s say your product import
